claim_text: The patient injured his right knee while playing pickup soccer.
The patient felt a pop in the knee.
The patient denies any other concerns.
There is significant effusion in the right knee.
There is slight ecchymosis in the right knee.
The patient experiences pain at the medial joint line with palpation.
The patient has an Anterior Cruciate Ligament tear.
The patient has moderate right knee swelling.
The patient has moderate pain on the right knee with palpation.
The patient has moderate right knee pain with movement.
An MRI of the right knee has been ordered.
The patient has been prescribed meloxicam 50mg daily.
The patient is encouraged to engage in moderate activity with knee immobilization and crutches.
The patient is advised to avoid jogging and strenuous activity for the time being.
The patient will be reevaluated after MRI results.
The patient will have a follow-up in a number of weeks.
